chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 106 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Disposed of matter For hearing of MA No.845/2023 04.10.2023 Mr. Ali Akbar Narejo, Advocate for applicant/surety. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Instant application has been filed by applicant Muhammad Urs seeking return of surety. As per contentions of learned Counsel for applicant, supporting by report of Accountant of this Court, it is revealed that accused were granted protective bail subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, vide order dated 15.12.2022, for a period of five days. The applicant stood surety on their behalf by submitting original Solvency Certificate No.14 dated 13.10.2022, re-validated till 12.01.2023, issued by Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Kingri. Within stipulated time, on 17.12.2022, the accused appeared before the trial Court along with an application U/S 498 CrPC, as is evident from the order dated 17.12.2022 of Anti-Terrorism Court, Khairpur, annexed with the application. In view of above, and the no objection for grant of the application extended by learned Additional P.G, listed application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document mentioned above to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. Let copy of this order be sent to the Mukhtiarkar concerned. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
